text_original: good so far, ads not intrusive
text_zh: 目前还不错，广告不干扰。
reply_original: Glad to hear you are enjoying the experience! We work hard to keep the balance so you can focus on your stories without too much interruption. If you ever have suggestions or run into issues, feel free to reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun with your characters!
reply_zh: 很高兴听到你喜欢这里的体验！我们努力维持平衡，以便你能专注于自己的故事而不受太多干扰。如果你有任何建议或遇到问题，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝你和你的角色玩得愉快！
